input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule EV.7.5.6 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ev.7.5.6
            TITLE: multiple cells may be monitored with one temperature sensor, if ev.7.5 is met for all cells

            CONTENT:
            rule EV.7.5.6: Multiple cells may be monitored with one temperature sensor, if EV.7.5 is met for all cells
EV.7.5.6 Multiple cells may be monitored with one temperature sensor, if EV.7.5 is met for all cells 
sensed by the sensor.

final_answer: Multiple cells may be monitored with one temperature sensor, if EV.7.5 is met for all cells sensed by the sensor.
